name: okta_threatinsight_security_threat_detected
description: Okta ThreatInsight flagged potentially malicious behavior (security.threat.detected).

validation.notes: Zero security.threat.detected events in 90d. The core detection (the eventType itself) ports cleanly. DEGRADED: Panther derives severity from debugContext.debugData.threatDetections (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/...), which is NOT ingested - so the per-threat severity tiering cannot be reproduced. okta.outcome.result is available (Panther downgrades DENY outcomes to INFO). Treat all matches as elevated until/unless threatDetections is added to ingestion.
